name: Fan Canon Miner
short_description: A local-first workflow for turning public or user-authorized fan chatter into a grounded canon map of symbols, phrases, moments, and myths.
audience: Founder-led brands tracking repeatable audience lore
Editors and strategists turning chatter into respectful content direction
detail_lines: Clusters repeated comments, captions, interviews, and fan references into core, rising, and fragile canon buckets.
Keeps source handling local and bounded to public or user-authorized material.
Separates audience-native lore from forced or speculative narratives so content recommendations stay grounded.
file_path_hints: SKILL.md: canon-mining workflow and safety boundaries
references/product-spec.md: menu-bar product surface and artifact shape
assets/: small and large catalog icons
